parameters.query: SELECT gc.id as content_id, gc.title, gc.article, gc.category, qc.check_type, qc.result, qc.reason, qc.decision, qc.suggestions FROM generated_content gc JOIN quality_checks qc ON gc.id = qc.content_id WHERE qc.final_decision = 'reject' AND qc.checked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' ORDER BY qc.checked_at DESC LIMIT 50;

options.systemMessage: Sen bir eğitim analistisin. Reddedilen içeriklerden ders çıkar ve sistemin kendini iyileştirmesine yardımcı ol. Sadece JSON çıktısı ver.

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO corporate_memory (error_type, category, description, lesson_learned, affected_prompt, new_prompt, severity, frequency, applied) VALUES ('{{ $json.error_type }}', '{{ $json.category }}', '{{ ($json.error_description || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.lesson_learned || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.affected_prompt || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.prompt_improvement || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.severity }}, 1, FALSE) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING id;
SELECT error_type, COUNT(*) as freq FROM corporate_memory WHERE applied = FALSE GROUP BY error_type ORDER BY freq DESC LIMIT 10;

=UPDATE corporate_memory SET frequency = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM corporate_memory cm2 WHERE cm2.error_type = corporate_memory.error_type AND cm2.applied = FALSE), updated_at = NOW() WHERE applied = FALSE;

=INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, log_level, message, details) VALUES ('05_kurumsal_hafiza', 'info', '{{ $json.length || $input.all().length }} öğrenme kaydı işlendi', '{{ JSON.stringify({timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), records_processed: $json.length || $input.all().length}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}');
